OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On August 8, 2022, a Woven Planet North America vehicle, which was operating in manual mode for the entire duration of the trip, 
contacted the curb while making a parking maneuver at Fell Street and Divisadero Street. This contact with the curb caused minor damage 
to the vehicle's rear wheel.
